mentions.note: Up 72% Q1 on multiple positive catalysts: lawsuit settlements, FDA flu vaccine review progress, departure of vaccine-skeptic Dr. Prasad from FDA; sixth-best S&P performer.
One of hottest stocks in market this year; personal cancer vaccines buzzed about; hope they happen but expecting them since public debut 7 years ago; reports Friday.
Up 50% in January after plunging 95% from 2021 peak; returning to revenue growth in 2026; personalized cancer vaccines potential; remains deeply unprofitable for years.
Working on cancer vaccine but stock up 54% YTD; wait and see if promise is real before adding; Cramer sympathetic to caller's cancer concerns.
